transcript: Uh, my team had some problems during our project and I kind of helped a little bit with communication. We finished the project eventually and it was okay.
I want this scholarship because I work hard and technology is important for the future. I hope it can help me continue my studies and improve my skills.

Hi, I am a computer science student and I like AI, cybersecurity, web development, robotics, and game development. I worked on a lot of different class projects and learned many programming languages and frameworks.
Uh, hi. I kind of like programming and maybe AI too. I worked on some projects before with classmates and I hope to get some experience in the future.

Hi, my name is Sarah and I am interested in accessibility-focused software engineering. Recently, I worked on a project that improved website accessibility for users with visual impairments. I enjoyed seeing how technology could directly improve user experiences, and I am currently looking for internship opportunities related to user-centered development.
Today I will talk about our AI project. We used different technologies and models and worked on many components including retrieval, embeddings, APIs, databases, and language models.
Uh, so basically our project kind of combines retrieval and AI together for feedback generation. We tested some different systems and stuff and got some results that were pretty interesting.

Good afternoon everyone. Today I will present our research on retrieval-augmented dialogue coaching systems. Our goal was to improve the specificity and usefulness of AI-generated feedback for interview preparation and presentations. We compared multiple retrieval methods including BM25, dense retrieval, and tag-aware retrieval. Although our system generated more grounded feedback overall, one limitation was the relatively small size of our coaching corpus, which sometimes reduced retrieval diversity.
